capabilities.notes: San Diego Padres @ Los Angeles Dodgers contest 15 and specs 33/34/35 passed target identity, allowlist, odds, and runway gates.
SDK/CLI v0.10.0, MM head 6f3ccc1 with strict allowlist / own-state / bounded-approval coverage, installed MM SDK v0.9.0, and ancillary repo heads were verified.
Expected-address checks passed for ospex-stage-maker-b, ospex-stage-maker-a, and ospex-flow-a; public balances were sufficient and allowances were bounded.
Only bounded USDC approvals were used; no unlimited approvals were created.
Candidates --allowlist-only returned quote-ready rows for contest 15 and all seeded markets; dry run stayed target-scoped with seedSpeculations=false.
Tiny live moneyline, spread, and total commitments posted under strict contest allowlist [15], seedSpeculations=false.
A controlled taker filled one live MM total quote for contest 15.
Telemetry captured the controlled fill without unknown-own-fill, owner-mapping, or divergence safety events; a startup stream-health hold cleared before controlled fill.
Final public/API/MM visible-open exposure is zero, target active/pending/claimable positions are zero after postgame, and no orphan MM process remained.
A scratch-state dry-run/cold-start probe loaded state cleanly and did not create duplicate live exposure; live CLI reads remained zero-open.
Official final score was verified and contest 15 scored via R5/CRE using CLI v0.10.0 score --wait.
Moneyline, spread, and total speculations 33/34/35 settled to expected winning sides.
Winning controlled positions were claimed, losing positions were no-op/not claimable, and final target positions are zero.
Tiny manual/live risk plus protocol fees stayed within the Phase 1 Block B low-cap budget; lifecycle transactions are summarized.

transactions.purpose: Create contest 15 for San Diego Padres @ Los Angeles Dodgers
Fully match tiny manual moneyline seed for contest 15 speculation 33
Fully match tiny manual spread seed for contest 15 speculation 34
Fully match tiny manual total seed for contest 15 speculation 35

Request R5 score for contest 15 after MLB official final
Claim flow-a winning position for speculation 35 side lower
Claim stage-maker-a winning position for speculation 33 side upper
Claim stage-maker-a winning position for speculation 34 side upper

verdict.label: FULL_GREEN
verdict.reason: The v0.10.0/R5 MM #146 strict-allowlist Phase 1 Block B run for San Diego Padres @ Los Angeles Dodgers completed the full lifecycle: contest 15 was created and verified; moneyline, spread, and total speculations 33/34/35 were manually seeded and fully filled with zero residual seed exposure; the market maker posted tiny live quotes under strict contest allowlist [15] with seedSpeculations=false; one controlled live total quote was filled; visible quotes were soft-cancelled or expired; final open commitments were zero; official final score San Diego Padres 5 / Los Angeles Dodgers 2 was verified; contest 15 was scored through R5/CRE; target speculations were settled, winning controlled positions were claimed, and final target active/pending/claimable positions are zero. Caveat: startup own-state stream-health hold cleared before controlled fill and left zero residual exposure.
